zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Talbot於1411年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，她的父親Thomas Talbot32歲，母親Agnes Catterall Lady32歲。她於1429年與John Stanhope在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾藍普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1455年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾藍普頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾藍普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Talbot于1411年出生在英国英格兰越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯时，她的父亲Thomas Talbot32岁，母亲Agnes Catterall Lady32岁。她于1429年与John Stanhope在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾藍普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1455年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾藍普頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾藍普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Talbot was born in 1411, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Talbot, was 32 and her mother, Agnes Catterall Lady, was 32. She married John Stanhope in 1429, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1455, in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Talbot est née en 1411, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Talbot, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Catterall Lady, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Stanhope en 1429, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1455, à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1429 in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom John Stanhope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1455 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rampton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Talbotが1411年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Thomas Talbotは32歳，母Agnes Catterall Ladyは32歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンでJohn Stanhopeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1455年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Talbot(이)가 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Talbot(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Catterall Lady(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 John Stanhope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 램프턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 램프턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Talbot родилась в 1411 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Talbot было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Catterall Lady, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stanhope в 1429 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1455 г. в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности рамптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John Stanhope en 1429, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1455, en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Rampton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
